'''majuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huayno|huayno]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huayno|huayno]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| majuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæjizith|mæjizith]] || [[word:mæjizij|mæjizij]] || [[word:mæjizish|mæjizish]] || [[word:mæjizi|mæjizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:majujuzuth|majujuzuth]] || [[word:majujuzuj|majujuzuj]] || [[word:majujuzush|majujuzush]] || [[word:majujuzu|majujuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:majuzuth|majuzuth]] || [[word:majuzuj|majuzuj]] || [[word:majuzush|majuzush]] || [[word:majuzu|majuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:majufzufth|majufzufth]] || [[word:majufzufj|majufzufj]] || [[word:majufzufsh|majufzufsh]] || [[word:majufzuf|majufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:majuzuthu|majuzuthu]] || [[word:majuzuju|majuzuju]] || [[word:majuzushu|majuzushu]] || [[word:majuzuku|majuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:majuzuth|majuzuth]] || [[word:majuzuj|majuzuj]] || [[word:majuzush|majuzush]] || [[word:majuzu|majuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:majuzuthul|majuzuthul]] || [[word:majuzujul|majuzujul]] || [[word:majuzushul|majuzushul]] || [[word:majuzukul|majuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:majuzuuthuthu|majuzuuthuthu]] || [[word:majuzuujuju|majuzuujuju]] || [[word:majuzuushushu|majuzuushushu]] || [[word:majuzuuku|majuzuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:majuzuthun|majuzuthun]] || [[word:majuzujun|majuzujun]] || [[word:majuzushun|majuzushun]] || [[word:majuzukun|majuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:majuzuthuoro|majuzuthuoro]] || [[word:majuzujuoro|majuzujuoro]] || [[word:majuzushuoro|majuzushuoro]] || [[word:majuzukuoro|majuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
